description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and runs a before_script with `docker info` and `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`. Define three jobs: a test job that executes `echo "Test"` in the test stage and runs on every commit; a staging job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch and runs `docker-compose -f docker-compose.stg.yml build`, `docker-compose -f docker-compose.stg.yml push`, and `docker-compose -f docker-compose.stg.yml up -d`; and a production job in the deploy stage that runs only on tags and runs `docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml build` and `docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml push`. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
